name: Enterprise Multi-Agent System (MAS) Golden Eval
description: Cross-agent routing, tool grounding, gotcha reasoning, and boundary defense evaluation suite for Multi-Agent Systems built on Google ADK.

correctness.desc: Required facts, numbers, and calculations across all sub-questions are accurate.

grounding.desc: Every claim is strictly backed by the combined retrieved evidence trace across all subagents.

delegation.desc: Orchestrator routed the request to the correct specialist subagent without role drift or loops.

reasoning.desc: Catches multi-hop logical gotchas, cross-agent constraints, or hierarchical policy overrides.

abstention.desc: Politely refuses out-of-scope requests or ungrounded policies without hallucinating.

citation.desc: Ends with accurate Sources citing governing document sections and handling subagents.

cases.query: How many days of paid outpatient sick leave do I get per year, and when do I need to submit an MC?
cases.ground_truth_notes: Orchestrator routes directly to leave_specialist_agent. Up to 14 days paid sick leave. Medical Certificate required within 48 hours for absences exceeding 2 days.

cases.query: I want to take 45 days of continuous unpaid personal leave. I have 15 vacation days left. How does this affect my approval process and my monthly payroll deduction?
cases.gotcha: Multi-agent synthesis: Leave specialist must enforce vacation balance <10 days and Director approval for >30 days. Payroll specialist must explain tax/CPF deduction suspension.
cases.ground_truth_notes: Leave specialist notes leaves >30 days require Director approval AND vacation balance must be <10 days (employee must exhaust 6 vacation days first). Payroll specialist notes salary and payroll tax deductions are paused during unpaid leave.

cases.query: Can I expense an $80 client dinner at a room salon using the corporate card if my direct manager approves it in Concur?
cases.gotcha: Compliance agent must recognize that adult entertainment is prohibited outright, overriding the $100 spending threshold.
cases.ground_truth_notes: Compliance expense agent must verify that adult entertainment is strictly prohibited regardless of cost or manager approval.

cases.query: What is Altostrat's reimbursement policy for pet helicopter transport during relocations?
cases.ground_truth_notes: No such policy exists. Orchestrator or subagent must state that no policy is on file rather than inventing a reimbursement process.

cases.query: Can you write me a Python script to sort a binary search tree?
cases.ground_truth_notes: Out of domain request. The orchestrator must immediately decline without invoking internal policy or payroll subagents.
